title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 open beta will take place at the end of August
summary: Activision confirms beta dates and the debate over movement speed resurges among players.

title: Game of Thrones strategy game War for Westeros delayed until 2027
summary: PlaySide Studios delays the release of the HBO RTS to ensure a high level of quality.

title: Judge temporarily blocks merger between Paramount and Warner Bros.
summary: A judge orders a suspension of at least 14 days for the merger due to a new legal hurdle.

title: DCKO announced, a new free-to-play DC fighting game for mobile devices
summary: DCKO, a free-to-play fighting game, has been announced for iOS and Android, ruling out that it is Injustice 3.

title: Valve warns that the memory crisis continues to worsen and prices rise
summary: Valve engineers confirm that the RAM shortage and rising costs threaten to make Steam Machines more expensive.

title: Actress Jennifer English leaves the lead role in Tides of Annihilation
summary: The studio loses another big name for the Arthurian action-RPG, following the departure of the well-known voice actress.

title: Activision confirms the setting of the Call of Duty movie
summary: Activision's president reveals the chosen context for the film adaptation of the shooter franchise.

title: Forza Horizon 5 director believes Game Pass was a good idea but didn't work
summary: The creative director of the racing game shares his opinion on Xbox's subscription model and its negative impact on sales.

title: Todd Howard confesses to being a regular Reddit user looking for ideas for his games
summary: The Bethesda director thanks fans for their support in online forums, where he admits to spending a lot of time.

title: First trailer for Avengers: Doomsday generates divided reactions among fans
summary: Marvel releases the trailer for its new film with Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom, sparking intense debate among fans.

title: FBI arrests young man for stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars with infected games on Steam
summary: The accused used malware in games like BlockBlasters to steal money and spend it on UberEats gift cards.

title: Kevin Feige blames himself for not being able to get the Blade movie with Mahershala Ali off the ground
summary: Marvel Studios president takes responsibility for the failure of the vampire hunter project and his inability to get it moving.

title: Ubisoft promises news about Ghost Recon in August
summary: The company confirms updates on the future of the series, but rules out any link to the Splinter Cell remake.

title: Neill Blomkamp releases an AI-generated film that receives harsh criticism
summary: The director of District 9 launches an experimental film created with artificial intelligence that specialized press rates as terrible.

title: Christopher Nolan calls artificial intelligence a glass Trojan horse
summary: The director of 'The Odyssey' harshly criticizes generative AI during the promotion of his new film, comparing it to a transparent threat.

title: Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link canceled but images of the game in space leak
summary: Despite its cancellation, videos of the spin-off appear online showing Keybladers in space, providing hints for the fourth installment.

title: Xbox reinforces commitment to console exclusive games
summary: Microsoft executives state that there must be strong reasons for players to buy an Xbox, with exclusives being the key.

title: British chain GAME enters administration with £16 million debt
summary: The video game retailer closes due to strong competition, changes in consumer habits, and Brexit uncertainty.

title: Cliff Bleszinski discusses his alcoholism and the development of Gears of War
summary: The designer of the Gears of War saga confesses that he developed much of the original trilogy under the influence of alcohol and plans his return to the industry.

title: Midgar studio liquidated by court after failing to find a buyer
summary: The studio responsible for Edge of Memories definitively closes with an almost finished game, victim of Nacon's bankruptcy.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker plans to innovate with save continuity between sequels
summary: The medieval vampire RPG seeks to offer a unique experience following CD Projekt's philosophy of not putting obstacles in the player's way on PC.

title: Kogado Studio announces Neosphere remaster for Switch and PC
summary: The classic JRPG returns with a remastered version called 'Neosphere of The Deep-blue Sky: Legacy' for Nintendo Switch and PC.

title: Valve promises no exclusive games for Steam Machines
summary: Valve engineer Pierre-Loup Griffais rules out the idea of having exclusive titles, stating that it is not a good business model for the company.

title: Unofficial Gears of War 2 PC port emerges 18 years later
summary: A fan releases Gears of War 2 from its Xbox 360 exclusivity via an unofficial PC port based on a leaked 2008 version.
